properties.formula: If([Product Name Text]<>"", [Product Name Text], [Product Dropdown])

URLRoot() & "db/" & Dbid() &
"?act=API_EditRecord&apptoken=c98jgpxw6rnv2cp98u7rckwaxw4" 
& "&_fid_21=" & URLEncode("Approved")//action log
& "&_fid_23=" & URLEncode("Approved")//operations approval status
& "&_fid_24=" & URLEncode(User())//response by
& "&_fid_22=" & URLEncode(Today())//approval date - capture
& "&_fid_164="& URLEncode(Today())//Ops Review Complete Date
& "&rid=" & [Record ID#]
& "&rdr=" & URLEncode(URLRoot() & "db/br9kwm8na" & "?a=dr&rid=" & [Related Project])

URLRoot() & "db/" & Dbid() &
"?act=API_EditRecord&apptoken=c98jgpxw6rnv2cp98u7rckwaxw4" 
& "&_fid_21=" & URLEncode("Rejected")
& "&_fid_24=" & URLEncode(User())
& "&_fid_23=" & URLEncode("Rejected")
& "&rid=" & [Record ID#]
& "&rdr=" & URLEncode(URLRoot() & "db/br9kwm8na" & "?a=er&act=dr&rid=" & [Related Project])

If(
ToText([Completed Date]) <> "", "Completed",//completely pointless status
[Operations Approval Status]="Approved", "Approved",
[Operations Approval Status]="Rejected", "Rejected",
[Action Log]<>"", "In Review",//unused except manually on ~40 adders
[Operations Approval Status]="Pending Review", "Pending Review",//set as default?
[Action Log]="", "Pending Review"
)
WeekdaySub([Completed Date],ToDate([Project - Sales Date]))
WeekdaySub(ToDate([Scheduled Start Date]),ToDate([Project - Sales Date]))
ToDays((ToDate([Scheduled Start Date]) - ToDate([Project - Sales Date])))
ToDays(([Completed Date] - ToDate([Project - Sales Date])))
[Manual Adjustment: PPW]*[Project - System Size(kW)]*1000
If([Total Cost]<>0,If([Adder Status]<>"Rejected",If([Related Adder - Product Name]="",[Product Name Text]&" - "&[Total Cost],[Related Adder - Product Name]&" - "&[Total Cost])))
[Product Category]&" | "&[Product Name]&" | "&[Total Cost]

null

[Total Cost]-[Initial Quote]

var number fixed = ([Kin Fulfillment PPW]*[Project - System Size(kW)]*1000)+[Kin Fulfillment Cost];

If([Invoiced Amount]<>0,[Invoiced Amount],If([Initial Quote]<>0,[Initial Quote],$fixed))
[Calculated Cost]-[Calculated Kin Fulfillment Total]

If(
    [Shutdown Date] = [CX Confirmed Date],
    If(
        [CX Confirmed Date] = [Inspection Date],
        true,
        false

    false
)
Contains([Contract Adder List],[Product Name])
Split([Project - Enerflo - adders],",")
ToText(GetFieldValues(GetRecord([Project - Maximum Adder Confirmation Design Record ID],"bsbhp6zhm"),380))
Contains([Confirmed Adder List],[Adder Name - Cost]) or not(IsNull([Adder Review: Manual Design Confirmation]))
not([Adder Source: Contract Adder?]) and ([Operations Approval Status]<>"Approved" or [Operations Approval Status]<>"Rejected")
[Qty]*[Total Cost]
